briefdescription.para: 0xB0 - Aes key should be programmed for DEC_ONLY eFuse programming
0xD0 - Dec only eFuse is already programmed
0xF0 - Already programmed eFuse Bit, can't be reverted
0xF1 - Error during validation of AES key write request as AES engine is disabled
0x8700 - Error in Meta header IV range programming
0x8800 - Error in Blk Obfus IV programming
0x8A00 - Error in Data Partition IV programming
0xB000 - Error in Writing Puf helper data efuse programming
0xB100 - Error in Puf syndrome data programming
0xB200 - Error in Puf Chash efuse programming
0xB300 - Error in Puf Aux efuse programming
0xEC00 - Error in programming of glitch configuration
0xED00 - Error in programming of glitch write lock
0xF000 - Error in Programming, no data is provided for Programming.
0xF100 - Error before programming eFuse, Temperature is out of range
0xF200 - Error before programming eFuse, Voltage is out of range
0xF300 - Error before programming eFuse, no supplies are enabled
0xF400 - Error before programming eFuse, new data is not available
0xFA00 - Error when eFuse access, is not enabled
0xFB00 - Error when accessed address range, of eFuse is invalid
0x20000 Glitch detected, due to which requested eFuses may be partially programmed
The following table lists the Versal common eFuse library error codes.
This file contains the error codes related to eFUSEs which are common for all platforms including Versal, Versal Net and Versal Gen 2 devices.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 kal 01/05/22 Initial release 3.1 skg 10/25/22 Added comments for macros and enums skg 12/07/22 Added error codes for Additional PPKs kpt 01/21/23 Removed error codes for Additional PPKs 3.2 kum 04/11/23 Moved Env error codes to common to make use for both versal and versalnet 3.3 ng 01/26/24 Fixed error number vss 02/23/24 Added IPI support for eFuse read and write ng 11/22/23 Fixed doxygen grouping 3.5 har 12/04/24 Added error code XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_AES_DISABLED 3.6 hj 04/15/25 Remove zero IV check in dec_only fuse programming
